nasb.text: You have not forsaken your brothers these many days to this day, but have kept the charge of the commandment of the Lord your God.

esv.text: You have not forsaken your brothers these many days, down to this day, but have been careful to keep the charge of the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 這許多日子以來，你們一直沒有撇棄你們的兄弟，直到今日；耶和華你們的　神吩咐你們的命令，你們也遵守了。

ccb.text: 这些日子以来，你们从没有离弃自己的弟兄，遵守了你们的上帝耶和华的吩咐。
